pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or potentially causing compatibility issues with Java 21-specific libraries.

Spring Boot 3.x and Java EE/Jakarta EE migration removed javax.annotation from the JDK and standard libraries; explicit dependency is required for annotations like @PostConstruct or @Resource to compile.
